Nosocomial infections represent the primary endpoint of NeoIPC surveillance. In`r dR$refIDRTable` the incidence densities of sepsis/BSI, pneumonia and necrotising enterocolitis, as well as the combined endpoint 'severe infection', are displayed. Overall `r dR$numberOfSevereInfections` severe infections were recorded in `r dR$numberOfPatients` infants resulting in an average number of `r dR$averageSevereInfectionsPerPatient` infections per patient.

`r sR$benchmarking_guidance`

`r if (nzchar(dR$refDevAssTable)) paste0("Device-associated infections can be found in", dR$refDevAssTable, ".")`
